Neuro Rehab

Gait Training & Evaluation System

Based on neural plasticity principles — simulates real walking mechanics with mechanical leg support. Restores normal walking function in stroke, Parkinson's, spinal cord injury, and multiple sclerosis patients.

  • Five Axis Linkage Technology for autonomous adaptive motion
  • Dynamic weight loss & longitudinal center of gravity augmentation
  • AI mirror gait learning assessment
  • Human-computer interactive training with VR feedback
  • 3 modes: passive, helpful, active

Neuro Rehab

Upper Extremity Feedback Training & Evaluation System

Ergonomic upper limb weight reduction manipulator based on ergonomics, with training and evaluation in 3D space. Built-in incentive feedback games and standardized evaluation tools.

  • 6-DOF manipulator — 1D, 2D and 3D multi-joint motion
  • Wireless space transmission technology
  • Both left and right arm switching with intelligent recognition
  • Weight reduction & grip strength feedback
  • Patient information and course management
Enquire Now WhatsApp
Neuro Rehab

Lower Extremity Feedback Training System

ZEPU-X8

Multi-integrated intelligent rehabilitation for functional gait reconstruction in ultra-early bedridden patients. Combines electric standing, active/passive gait training, weight support, and situational interaction.

  • Bed height range: 50–85 cm; Step speed: 1–80 steps/min
  • Automatic spasm protection with 3 sensitivity levels
  • Active & passive training modes; 200 KG max loading
  • Sitting, standing, horizontal step training modes
  • Spasm protection: Found spasm → Reverse Motion → Stop → Slow Down → Restart
Enquire Now WhatsApp
Neuro Rehab

Multifunctional System for Hand Training

AE-SG1

The most comprehensive hand function rehabilitation table — 12 types of hand training programs. 10-level weight stack resistance. Simultaneously trains up to 4 patients.

  • Hand lifting, wrist flexion/extension, forearm rotation
  • Finger stretch, ball grip, thumb-to-palm training
  • 10-level counterweight resistance up to 3000g
  • Improves hand movement, muscle strength, proprioception
  • Component material: aluminium magnesium alloy, POM plastic
Enquire Now WhatsApp
Neuro Rehab

Hand Training Intelligent Version

AE-SG1 Pro

Advanced version with tablet integration — 4 training games for digitized, gamified hand rehabilitation. Provides comprehensive monitoring and training records.

  • 4 built-in games: Parkour, Gold Miner, Airplane, Jump Stepper
  • Digitized training records and result visualization
  • 13 training parameters including ball grip, wrist deviation, forearm rotation
  • Rich industrial injury training content
  • 10-level resistance hardware up to 3000g

Neuro Rehab

Cognitive Exercise — Unilateral & Bilateral Hands

AE-SG3

Upper limb cognitive integration training using standard evaluation methods, data collection, and clinical reports. Trains active joint ROM and cognitive functions after nerve injury.

  • 6 accessory types: Y-shaped, I-shaped, horizontal armrest, steering wheel, door handle, disc knob
  • Hand-eye coordination & spatial discrimination training
  • Color and cognitive correction training
  • Neuromuscular control training
  • Automatic training result storage and retrieval
Enquire Now WhatsApp
Neuro Rehab

Anti Gravity Treadmill

GA-100S / GA-80S

NASA-originated Differential Air Pressure (DAP) technology. Reduces body weight load from 100% to as low as 20% — enabling pain-free gait rehabilitation and aerobic conditioning.

  • AI-assisted air pressure control; gravity reduction in 1% increments
  • Ultra-low start speed 0.1 km/h; 7-speed acceleration gears
  • Intelligent gait analysis with real-time quantitative data
  • Safe for heart, blood vessel, and respiratory disease patients
  • Reverse speed 0–5 km/h; Forward speed 0–15 km/h (GA-100S)
Enquire Now WhatsApp
Neuro Rehab

Upper Limb Rehabilitation Robot

SY-UEA2

CE, FDA & ISO certified robotic arm for stroke, brain injury, cerebral palsy, Parkinson's, lymphedema, and Alzheimer's patients. Precision optical positioning and multi-dimensional training.

  • Multi-dimensional training: muscle strength, ROM, ADL, coordination
  • Intelligent data analysis & real-time monitoring of user status
  • One-touch height adjustment; compatible with wheelchairs
  • Built-in powerful lithium battery; operates independently
  • Ergonomic design with 4 sets of safety protection systems
Enquire Now WhatsApp
Neuro Rehab

Dynamic Arm Support

SYREBO

Provides gravity compensation for multi-dimensional natural upper limb movement. 12-level assistance force, adaptable to all rehabilitation stages. 270° motion trajectory for full range joint movement.

  • Gravity compensation spring system for weak muscle strength
  • 12-level assistance force; covers full shoulder and elbow motion
  • 270° horizontal motion trajectory
  • Diversified customizable training programs with immersive scenes
  • Assistance and resistance training modes
Enquire Now WhatsApp
Neuro Rehab

Unweighing System

Enables partial weight-bearing therapy with open patient access. Single-point suspension controlling pelvic rotation and vertical displacement for functional gait practice. Lifts up to 180 kg.

  • 36"W x 50" depth x 106"H; electrically height adjusted
  • Bilateral measurement of body weight support
  • Sit-to-Stand lift capability
  • Battery + mains operation; locking castor wheels
  • Compatible with gait trainer and over-ground use
